subcodes.first_line: O Mustafa! Thou hast been mentioned by the Most Exalted Pen, and this is yet another time, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord, the Lord of all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مصطفی قد ذکرت من القلم الاعلی و تلک مره اخری لتشکر ربک مولی الوری و
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude
